zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Scriven於1417年出生在英國史洛普爾福洛德斯利時，他的父親John Scriven26歲，母親Marion Salter29歲。他於大約1449年與Elizabetha Alicia Corbet在英國英格蘭藍卡爾李結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1496年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾福洛德斯利享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Scriven于1417年出生在英国史洛普爾福洛德斯利时，他的父亲John Scriven26岁，母亲Marion Salter29岁。他于大约1449年与Elizabetha Alicia Corbet在英国英格兰藍卡爾李结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1496年在英国英格兰史洛普爾福洛德斯利享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scriven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for a professional scribe, copyist, or clerk, from Middle English scrivein ‘scribe’ (Old French escrivain, medieval Latin scribanus). Compare Scrivener .
habitational name from Scriven (Yorkshire), from Old English scræfen, screfen ‘hollow place, place with caves or pits’.

variants.name: Scrivener
meanings: English: occupational name for a professional scribe, copyist, or clerk, from Middle English scrivener ‘scribe’ (a derivative of scrivain). Compare Scriven .

variants.name: Skirvin
meanings: Scottish: possibly a variant of Scriven , with metathesis of -ri- to -ir-. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Scrivens
meanings: English: variant of Scriven , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Scriven was born in 1417, in Frodesley, Shropshire, England, his father, John Scriven, was 26 and his mother, Marion Salter, was 29. He married Elizabetha Alicia Corbet about 1449, in Leigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1496, in Frodesley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Scriven est né en 1417, à Frodesley, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, John Scriven, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Marion Salter, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabetha Alicia Corbet environ 1449, à Leigh, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1496, à Frodesley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Scriven 1417 in Frodesley, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Scriven 26 und seine Mutter Marion Salter 29. Er hat um 1449 in Leigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Elizabetha Alicia Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1496 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Frodesley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Scriven è nato il nel 1417 nel Frodesley, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, John Scriven, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Marion Salter, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elizabetha Alicia Corbet circa 1449, nel Leigh, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1496, nel Frodesley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Scrivenが1417年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアフロデスリーで生まれた時，父John Scrivenは26歳，母Marion Salterは29歳であった。約1449年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアレイグでElizabetha Alicia Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1496年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアフロデスリーで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Scriven(이)가 1417년 영국 슈럽실르 프로데슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Scriven(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion Salter(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1449년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리에서 Elizabetha Alicia Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1496년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 프로데슬리에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Scriven nasceu em 1417, em Frodesley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Scriven, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Marion Salter, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabetha Alicia Corbet aproximadamente 1449, em Leigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1496, em Frodesley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Scriven родился в 1417 г. в местности фродесли, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Scriven было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Salter, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabetha Alicia Corbet около 1449 г. в местности лиг, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1496 г. в местности фродесли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Scriven nació en 1417, en Frodesley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Scriven, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Marion Salter, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabetha Alicia Corbet aproximadamente 1449, en Leigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1496, en Frodesley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
